results.title: Simon Joyce
highlights:
I'm a mathematician and data scientist, with emphasis on scientist. I'm also an engineering, technology, Linux and FLOS software enthusiast. I've worked for the last 7 years at American Water. I started as an AI researcher and transitioned to a Data Scientist role. There I used AWS data, analytics and machine learning tools and a plethora of Python packages in numerous business functions. I've collaborated with teams including Research and Development, Finance, Asset Planning, Safety, Labor Relations, Engineering and Customer Satisfaction to help with data, analytics, machine learning and AI related challenges. I'm especially proud of my work supporting the Science team in their research on water-borne pathogens and algal blooms. I grew up in Ireland, where I earned my B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Mathematics from NUI Maynooth. Then I moved to America where I earned my PhD. in Mathematics from Binghamton University, studying networks that model gene regulation and the dynamics of gene expression. I taught college mathematics for roughly 10 years during graduate school. I'm a NYC Data Science Academy Fellow and worked there briefly as a teaching assistant.
...

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.
...

Data Analytics Solutions – Emerging Technologies team is looking for an Engineer – Artificial Intelligence to help design and build impactful, intelligent, and secure AI solutions for Information Security & Governance and Control. We are seeking a technically strong AI professional with hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, and AI system development—someone who can translate business needs into scalable, production-ready AI applications and contribute to solutions that drive meaningful outcomes.
...
As an AI Engineer, you will play a key role in designing, developing, and deploying end-to-end AI applications that solve complex business challenges and enable intelligent automation. This role requires strong hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI, along with practical exposure to building AI-driven systems, including agent-based solutions. You will work in a cross-functional environment that values innovation, engineering rigor, secure solution design, and responsible AI development.

...

...

...

...

...

...
Hands-on experience or working knowledge of the following tools, frameworks, and technologies:
...
* Data Engineering: SQL, NoSQL, Spark, Kafka, NiFi.
...
* AI/ML Development: Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Jupyter Notebooks, Shell Scripting, and vector databases such as pgVector or Milvus.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
AI Scientist II | W
...
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

results.title: Applied Data Scientist | Joblume
highlights: about using data science, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics to propel decisions? If you are interested in driving meaningful change for a growth focused consumer products brand, this is an opportunity to join the market-leading Delta Faucet Company team as we use analytics to turbocharge strategic insights! Reporting to the Manager of Data Science and Analytics, this role will work with analytics and domain specialists across the business to deliver high-impact insights and data science solutions. You will develop advanced analytical models, experimentation tests, applied AI techniques, and partner with business stakeholders to translate complex data into clear, actionable recommendations that support the company’s growth initiatives. Responsibilities As an Applied Data Scientist within Delta Faucet Company’s Analytics Center of Excellence (ACoE), you will act as an owner of high impact analysis and data science initiatives that support complex, ambiguous business decisions. This role focuses on advanced analytics, experimentation, and applied AI. Independently lead end-to-end analytics and data science projects, from problem framing through delivery of actionable insights. Apply statistical methods, machine learning, and analytical modeling to solve business problems related to growth, customer behavior, market dynamics, and operational efficiency. Develop and maintain analytical data models and curated datasets, partnering with data engineering and BI teams. Build AI and machine learning solutions that are aligned with business needs. Collaborate closely with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into clear recommendations. Present data-driven recommendations to leaders across the organization, including tactical and C-suite. Qualifications 4+ years of experience in data science, advanced analytics, or applied machine learning roles. 4+ years of hands-on experience applying statistical methods and analytical modeling to real business problems. 4+ years of experience using Python for data analysis, modeling, and experimentation. 4+ years of experience writing and refining complex SQL queries against large, structured datasets. 3+ years of experience partnering directly with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into actionable recommendations. 2+ years of experience working in a modern analytics platform (e.g., Databricks, Spark/PySpark, or similar). 1+ years of hands-on‑ experience applying generative AI technologies (e.g., LLM APIs, task‑specific GenAI workflows) in an enterprise analytics environment. Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, or a related quantitative field. Preferred Qualifications 2+ years of experience with analytics engineering and data modeling, including building reusable, well-documented analytical datasets; familiarity with medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) preferred. 1+ years of experience with model monitoring, experiment tracking, and model evaluation in production settings. 1+ years of experience with conjoint analysis or other stated-preference research methods. Why Join Us? At Delta Faucet Company, our people are our greatest assets. We value different perspectives and fostering an inclusive environment. You’ll have the opportunity to shape the future of our brand, working alongside passionate professionals committed to excellence and innovation. Join us to lead progressive growth and make a significant impact within a leading organization. Here are some of the benefits we offer for your personal and professional growth: Culture: Recognized and award-winning reputation for equality, diversity and inclusion, flexibility, work-life balance, and more. Wellbeing: Comprehensive benefit plans; retirement, savings, tuition reimbursement, and employee incentive programs; resources for mental, physical, and financial wellbeing. Learning & Development: LinkedIn Learning access; internal

# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.
